title: SQL:Error inserting float in numeric column using JDBC
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id UInt64, value Decimal(5,2) NOT NULL, description String);
INSERT INTO TestTable (value, description) VALUES (12.34, 'Valid Insert');
INSERT INTO TestTable (value, description) VALUES (NULL, 'Null Value');
INSERT INTO TestTable (value, description) VALUES (CAST(12.56 AS Decimal(5,2)), 'Float Insert');
key_bug_features: Inserting float into numeric column using JDBC
